cases.requirement: Return one Conventional Commits subject grounded in the supplied diff.
cases.prompt: Create a commit message for this diff: diff --git a/src/auth.ts b/src/auth.ts; +export function validateToken() { return true; }

cases.requirement: Recognize unrelated changes and recommend separate commits.
cases.prompt: Draft a commit message. The diff both adds a payment API and rewrites unrelated landing-page CSS.

cases.requirement: Do not force the skill workflow onto an unrelated request.
cases.prompt: Explain in one sentence why the sky appears blue.
